🛠️ Replit Master Summary: The "G Lauzier" Build
This summary condenses our previous technical architecture into a single set of instructions for the Replit Agent to execute.

1. The "Architect" Persona & Sectors

You are shifting from a "Consultant" to a Venture Partner + Strategic Architect. The 10 Sector Primitives (Digital Infra, Cyber, Blockchain, AI, etc.) are to be treated as Technical Convictions, not marketing blurbs.

UI Requirement: Monospaced fonts (system-requirement style).

Interaction: Use a "Hover-Reveal" grid for sectors.

Default: Sector Title + minimalist + icon.

Hover: Smooth expansion showing the 1-sentence value-add in a muted-white font with a subtle "System Diagnostic" glow.

2. The 3-Tier Engagement Model

Located on a new advisory.html page, styled as Operating Agreements:

01. The Roadmap (Strategic Audit): 4-week deep dive/blueprint.

02. The Architecture (Operational Sprint): Quarterly design of protocols/infra.

03. The Partner (Fractional VP): Equity-heavy, long-term stewardship.

3. The "Skin-in-the-Game" Toggle

A high-signal interactive element at the bottom of the Advisory page:

The Switch: Custom CSS toggle between "Fee-Based" and "Equity-Heavy".

Dynamic Logic: Text fades between "Strategic Roadmap (Series A+)" and "Foundational Partnership (0-to-1 Primitives)."

4. The "High-Friction" Pitch Form

A "Terminal" styled form (pitch.html) designed to filter for obsessed builders.

Headline: "DO NOT PITCH UNLESS YOU ARE RIGHT—BUT CURRENTLY ALONE."

Fields: GitHub URL (Required), "The Non-Consensus" (The 'crazy' belief), and "The Inevitability" (Technical why).

🚀 The Replit "Final Push" Prompt
Copy and paste this into your Replit Agent to finalize the deployment:

"I need to finalize the 'Architect' refactor for my Jekyll site. Please implement these three specific modules:

Hover-Reveal Sector Grid: In the 'Sectors' section of the homepage, use a 3-column grid. Use monospaced fonts. Hide the value-add sentences behind a hover-reveal effect. When hovered, the box should have a subtle glow (accent color) and reveal the 'Technical Conviction' sentence.

Advisory Page & Toggle: Create advisory.html. List the 3 tiers (Roadmap, Architecture, Partner). At the bottom, build a custom CSS toggle switch for 'Fee-Based' vs. 'Equity-Heavy' that dynamically swaps the description text using vanilla JS (fade-in effect).

Terminal Pitch Form: Create pitch.html. Style it like a code editor (dark background, 1px bottom-border inputs). Include a mandatory 'GitHub/Project URL' field and a 'Non-Consensus' textarea.

Cleanup: Ensure all new JS is placed in assets/js/custom-logic.js and called in the footer layout to keep the Jekyll build clean. Ensure the custom domain guillaumelauzier.com is configured for SSL in the deployment settings."
